title: send_payment(): compose build_shielded_tx + memo + broadcast + record
description:
Implement the top-level send function that orchestrates: sync-lag check → note selection → tx build → broadcast → DB record.

pub async fn send_payment(
    sk: &SaplingExtendedSpendingKey,
    to_address: &str,
    amount_zatoshi: u64,
    session_id: Uuid,
    store: &WalletStore,
    client: &LightwalletdClient,
    params_paths: &SaplingParamPaths,
    network: ZcashNetwork,
) -> Result<TxId, SendPaymentError>

pub enum SendPaymentError {
    SyncLag(SyncLagError),
    Build(TxBuildError),
    Broadcast(BroadcastError),
    Db(anyhow::Error),
}

Algorithm:
1. check_sync_lag(store, client, MAX_SYNC_LAG).await → propagate SyncLag
2. store.spendable_notes(PAYMENT_ACCOUNT).await → notes
3. Load params: load_sapling_params(params_paths) → propagate Build error
4. Get anchor_height from the latest witness in notes (max block_height across selected notes)
5. Build memo: session_id_to_memo(session_id)
6. build_shielded_tx(sk, to_address, amount_zatoshi, &memo, &notes, &params, network, anchor_height) → propagate Build
7. client.broadcast_tx(&tx_bytes).await → propagate Broadcast
8. Mark spent notes: store.mark_note_spent(note_id, txid).await for each selected note
9. store.insert_tx(TxRecord { txid, direction: Outgoing, amount_zatoshi, ... }).await
10. Return TxId

Defensive rules:
- Log: 'payment initiated: amount={amount} zatoshi session={session_id}' at info level (amount and session_id are safe to log; recipient address is not)
- Never log to_address, note plaintext, or sk bytes
- If mark_note_spent fails after broadcast: log error at warn level with txid, continue — tx is already on chain
- If insert_tx fails: log error at warn level, continue — balance will reconcile on next scan
- Steps 8 and 9 use best-effort (log+continue) because the tx is already broadcast; aborting here would lose the txid

Tests (mock client + in-memory WalletStore):
- Happy path: mock notes, mock broadcast returning known txid → Ok(txid)
- SyncLag error propagates → SendPaymentError::SyncLag
- Build error propagates → SendPaymentError::Build
- Broadcast error propagates → SendPaymentError::Broadcast, notes NOT marked spent
- After success: store.all_sessions() shows Outgoing tx record
- After success: spent notes are marked spent in DB
- Log test: verify 'payment initiated' appears in tracing output; verify no address or key material logged

Use at minimum two parallel subagents: one to research BroadcastError variants from client.rs, one to research TxId type and how txid is returned from broadcast_tx.
acceptance_criteria: happy path test passes with mock infrastructure; spent notes are marked; TxRecord is inserted; no to_address in log output
close_reason: send_payment() in wallet/src/payment.rs with WalletClient trait, SendPaymentError, 4 tests passing (happy path, SyncLag, NoSpendableNotes, broadcast failure)
